assertions.assertion: An authorization policy requiring the 'catalog.read' scope is defined using RequireClaim
An authorization policy requiring the 'catalog.write' scope is defined using RequireClaim
The GET /products endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization() referencing the read policy
assertions.rationale: Response shows .RequireAuthorization("catalog:read") on the GET /products endpoint

assertions.assertion: The POST /products endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization() referencing the write policy
assertions.rationale: Response shows .RequireAuthorization("catalog:write") on the POST /products endpoint

assertions.assertion: builder.Services.AddAuthorization is called to register the policies
assertions.rationale: Response shows builder.Services.AddAuthorization(options => { ... }) with both policies
